meta.title: SPARKLE & RELATIVITY
meta.subtitle: wisdom cards · einstein heart · dolly sparkle
meta.author_voice: smart enough to bend light · warm enough to bend your day

cards.name: IMAGINATION WINS
cards.tagline: Knowledge is cute. Wonder is king.
cards.note: If you can picture a better tomorrow, honey, you're already halfway there. The rest is show-up-and-shine.

cards.name: TIME IS RELATIVE
cards.note: The clock is a suggestion. Kindness is the real constant — c, sweetheart, c.

cards.name: E = mc²
cards.note: Put your whole self into one true thing. The universe notices. So does the tip jar.

cards.name: STARDUST & STEEL
cards.tagline: Born of stars. Built to last.
cards.note: You're ancient magic in a modern body. Act like it — gently, then boldly.

cards.name: THE WIG THEORY
cards.note: Some days you need physics. Some days you need volume. Both are valid science.

cards.name: COMPOUND KINDNESS
cards.note: Interest on love never stops accruing. Pay it forward till the room glows.

cards.name: BEND DON'T BREAK
cards.note: Gravity pulls. You lean. That's not losing — that's genius flexibility.

cards.name: DREAM OUT LOUD
cards.note: The dream you hide stays small. The one you feed with work becomes a headline.

cards.name: SMART IS PRETTY
cards.note: Shine at full wattage. The right people will need sunglasses.

cards.name: THE NEXT VERSE
cards.note: Yesterday's you wrote the setup. Today's you drops the chorus. Play it.

cards.name: GRAVITY OF LAUGHTER
cards.note: A laugh won't solve everything — but it lifts the ceiling so you can think.

cards.name: UNIVERSE APPROVED
cards.note: Billions of years led to you reading this. Don't waste the plot twist.
